purpose: Full-game InnsmouthIsland graphical asset requirements guide for Recraft-compatible manifest generation with mandatory transparent backgrounds, 32-dimensional coherency, and full depth-precision mapping discipline.

background_policy: Every asset must render on alpha with no opaque matte, no filled sky, no solid backdrop, and no scenic framing card.
Landscape, skyline, skybox, weather, horizon, and architecture assets must be authored as isolated compositing layers rather than baked final paintings.
All foreground, midground, background, and atmospheric layers must remain independently stackable in ORBSystems runtime composition.
hard_constraints.negative_prompt: opaque background, solid background, painted matte, baked backdrop, filled sky rectangle, scenic poster frame, text, watermark, logo, border, UI mockup, cropped subject

orb32_requirements.coherency: All asset prompts must reference 32-dimensional coherency and treat each still or keyframe as a stable slice in a larger ORBSystems asset field.

art_direction.silhouette: expressionistic, angular, aggressive break-up, no mushy rounded massing unless a monster concept specifically needs contrast
art_direction.posing: angular, staged, readable attack lines, hard directional intent, strong combat and traversal line-of-action
art_direction.materials: wet shell, brine metal, coral, eelbone, basalt, ritual pearl, soaked rope, fungal residue, black-tide ooze
art_direction.lighting: single coherent light family with stable highlight logic, readable shadow planes, no contradictory rims

asset_strategy.single_frame_policy: Prefer one isolated hero asset or one tightly related keyframe cluster per output whenever possible.
asset_strategy.sheet_policy: Use sprite sheets only when multiple related frames materially improve runtime completeness.
asset_strategy.landscape_policy: Split world scenery into transparent layer families: sky strata, horizon silhouettes, canopy bands, ruins, fog, rain, spores, light shafts, and water overlays.
